calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-13-2024 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2023 Set For Trial On Jun-10-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants' demurrer to the first amended complaint is overruled.

Defendants fail to meet the basic requirements for a demurrer. "A demurrer shall distinctly specify the grounds upon which any of the objections to the complaint are taken. Unless it does so, it may be disregarded." (CCP 430.60.) "Each ground of demurrer must be in a separate paragraph and must state whether if applies to the entire complaint or to specified causes of action or defenses." (CRC 3.1320(a).) Defendants do none of this.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Off Calendar May-02-2023 Off Calendar

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT HAYES VALLEY PROPERTIES, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter is calendar as moot. Plaintiff filed a first amended complaint on April 19.
